body.title: Device / Shim — the design center
body.summary: The design center: every component inherits from BaseDevice / BaseShim — OOP-first, no standalone functions doing device work — so the framework can iterate all devices uniformly for start/stop/restart/self_test/rollback. BaseShim itself has no idle_wait; the IDLE loop lives in the bus-facing component the shim launches. Each device is one subdirectory under devices/, independently deployable, so a broken import can't crash the whole rack. Devices inherit the CP1-CP6 core values via CoreValuesMixin.

key_concepts.name: BaseShim lifecycle
key_concepts.what: start/stop/restart/self_test/rollback — uniform across devices; start() launches the bus-facing IDLE component

key_concepts.name: core values
key_concepts.what: every device inherits CP1-CP6 via CoreValuesMixin; frozen contract in diagnostic_base/core_values.py
